executives.name: Tufan Erginbilgic
executives.background: Tufan Erginbilgic joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Executive Officer in January 2023. He previously spent over 20 years at BP, including as CEO of BP's Downstream business. He has held several non-executive directorships in heavy industry and manufacturing companies.

executives.name: Helen McCabe
executives.background: Helen McCabe joined Rolls-Royce as Chief Financial Officer in September 2023. She was previously Senior Vice President, Finance for BP's Customer & Products division and has extensive experience in senior finance roles within the energy sector.

board_of_directors.name: Anita Frew
board_of_directors.background: Anita Frew was appointed Chair of Rolls-Royce in October 2021. She has extensive experience as a chair and non-executive director across various sectors including chemicals, engineering, and finance. She is also Chair of Croda International Plc.

board_of_directors.name: Sir Kevin Smith
board_of_directors.background: Sir Kevin Smith joined the Board in 2015. He was previously CEO of GKN plc and has a deep background in the aerospace and automotive industries.

board_of_directors.name: George Culmer
board_of_directors.background: George Culmer joined the Board in 2020. He was previously CFO of Lloyds Banking Group and RSA Insurance Group. He is also Chair of Aviva plc.

board_of_directors.name: Dame Angela Strank
board_of_directors.background: Dame Angela Strank joined the Board in 2020. She was previously Chief Scientist and Head of Downstream Technology at BP.
